purpose: Enhanced Date wrapper using Temporal API with timezone management, ISO 8601 formatting, and interop with Google Sheets and PDF date formats
keyExports: DateTime — class wrapping Temporal API with extended formatting and conversion methods
DateTime.from() — factory method to create a DateTime instance
DateTime.tryFrom() — safe factory method returning undefined on invalid input

keyPatterns.name: DateTime factory
keyPatterns.description: Use DateTime.from(input) to create instances; accepts Date, string, number, Temporal objects, or nothing for now. Use DateTime.tryFrom() for safe construction.

keyPatterns.name: ISO with timezone offset
keyPatterns.description: toISOLocalString() produces ISO 8601 format with the local timezone offset instead of UTC Z suffix

keyPatterns.name: Comparison methods
keyPatterns.description: equals(), compare(), isBefore(), isAfter(), isSameOrBefore(), isSameOrAfter() for comparing DateTime instances

architecture.keyDesign: Wraps Temporal API; provides fluent API for timezone, formatting, Julian Day, Google Sheets, and PDF date interop. DateEx is a deprecated alias for DateTime.
